description: fetchCheckoutDeps runs three independent service calls in parallel via Promise.all; fetchAdminPageDeps and fetchDebugPageDeps await sequentially.

findings.rationale: fetchCheckoutDeps parallelises with Promise.all while the other two helpers await sequentially. The Promise.all is load-bearing on the checkout path: cart abandonment correlates with wall-clock latency, and serialising the three independent fetches restored the latency regression that drove this code change.
